title: Task
description: Schema for a single Beads task in the Single Spine agentic system.

id.description: Unique task identifier. Beads auto-generated ID (e.g. my-project-hv7) or legacy task-NNN format.

type.description: Task classification. Use feature/bug/task/epic for deliverable work. chore is reserved for Orchestrator-generated tracking issues (question, security).

inputs.description: Artifacts, data, or conditions required before this task can start.

outputs.description: Artifacts or state changes produced by this task.

files.description: Source files this task reads or modifies.

dependencies.description: IDs of tasks that must be completed before this one can start. Use beads IDs. Empty array = no dependencies.

acceptance_criteria.description: Observable, testable outcomes that define done. Each item is a single criterion.

test_plan.description: Commands or test file paths the Orchestrator runs to verify the task. Must be executable as-is.

module.description: Optional. Name of the module this task belongs to (matches modules/{module-name}/).

priority.description: Optional. 1 = highest, 5 = lowest. Used by beads_viewer triage.

notes.description: Optional. Free-form context for the Worker. Not evaluated by validator.
